task_text: P1 #2 TG pacing: add central per-chat retry_after-aware pacing + bounded single retry to the Telegram send path in scout/alerter.py (pre-send wait if chat paced; on 429 honor retry_after, pause that chat, retry once within a budget); unify send_alert to route its Telegram send through send_telegram_message so the main candidate-alert path is also paced + instrumented; add source= labels to all send_telegram_message/send_alert callsites. Behind Settings flags, TDD.
